name: Euro 7 + CO₂ compliance program
risk_rationale: Forces continued heavy R&D investment into legacy combustion engines to meet particulate and durability limits, severely draining capital needed for the EV transition.

name: EV portfolio doubling (Epiq + Peaq rollout)
risk_rationale: Cooling European EV demand and intense Chinese price competition threaten the profitability of these critical sub-€25k entry-level models.

name: China exit + redeploy to India/ASEAN
risk_rationale: Exiting a massive historic profit pool forces rapid, highly complex localization in ASEAN and India. Failure to execute risks devastating volume loss against emerging market challengers.

name: UX Product House (in-cabin software turnaround)
risk_rationale: The failure of the internal 'single platform' OS has forced a chaotic pivot to external partners (Rivian/Xpeng), risking loss of tech autonomy and introducing massive software integration friction.

name: UNECE R155 CSMS compliance + cyber resilience
risk_rationale: Non-compliance risks immediate Loss of Vehicle Type Approval (sales ban). Retrofitting legacy E/E architectures to meet strict, mandatory cyber laws is proving notoriously difficult and expensive.
